# Azure FinOps (HyperaFinOps) Documentation Index

**Type:** Multi-part with 2 parts
**Primary Language:** DAX, Power Query (M), Python
**Architecture:** Star Schema (Power BI PBIP)
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-27

## Project Overview

Azure FinOps is an enterprise cost management solution for Hypera Pharma (Brazil, BRL) built on Power BI (PBIP format). It provides Azure EA billing analysis across 7 report pages covering executive overview, cost detail, service breakdown, marketplace spend, reservations, anomaly detection, and tag compliance — with Python automation for data export and alerting. Follows the FinOps Framework (finops.org).

## Project Structure

This project consists of 2 parts:

### finops-powerbi (Power BI Project)

- **Type:** Data / Business Intelligence
- **Location:** `finops-powerbi/`
- **Tech Stack:** Power BI (PBIP), TMDL, DAX, Power Query (M), Python 3.10+
- **Entry Point:** `HyperaFinOps.pbip` (open in Power BI Desktop)

### finops-data (Billing Data Exports)

- **Type:** Data Storage
- **Location:** `finops/` and `docs/202602/`
- **Tech Stack:** CSV files (Azure EA exports)
- **Entry Point:** CSVs in `Parameter_ExportFolder`

## Cross-Part Integration

The Power BI project reads CSV billing exports via `Folder.Files(Parameter_ExportFolder)`. Python scripts automate data export from Azure EA APIs to CSV format.

## Quick Reference

### finops-powerbi Quick Ref

- **Stack:** Power BI PBIP + TMDL + DAX + PQ + Python
- **Entry:** `HyperaFinOps.pbip`
- **Pattern:** Star Schema (3 facts, 6 dimensions)
- **EA Enrollment:** 53329720
- **Monthly spend:** ~R$ 1.2Mi
- **Currency:** BRL, labels in pt-BR

## Generated Documentation

### Core Documentation

- [Project Overview](./project-overview.md) - Executive summary and high-level architecture
- [Source Tree Analysis](./source-tree-analysis.md) - Annotated directory structure
- [Architecture](./architecture.md) - Detailed technical architecture (layers, data flow, patterns)
- [Data Models](./data-models.md) - Star schema: 3 fact tables, 6 dimension tables, relationships
- [Development Guide](./development-guide.md) - Local setup, common tasks, Python scripts, troubleshooting

### Deep-Dive Documentation

- [Azure Spot VMs Deep Dive](./deep-dive-spot-vms.md) - Spot VM pricing, eviction types, ARG queries, Placement Score API, and proposed HyperaFinOps integration (Page 8: Otimização Spot)

### FinOps Framework Reference

- [FinOps 2026 Framework](./finops-2026-framework.md) - 2026 framework update: updated definition, 5 technology categories, 6 renamed capabilities, new Executive Strategy Alignment capability, and full HyperaFinOps alignment map
- [Container Costs — AKS Guide](./container-costs-aks.md) - Full FinOps WG methodology with Azure/AKS callouts: cost components, allocation strategies, QoS classes, optimization tactics, and HyperaFinOps integration gaps
- [FinOps Hub MER](./finops-hub-mer.md) - Entity-relationship model for Microsoft FinOps Hub (finops-toolkit): 5 core FOCUS datasets, 6 reference tables, Mermaid ERD, relationship narrative, and key cost columns
- [FinOps Toolkit Overview](./finops-toolkit-overview.md) - Full reference for the Microsoft FinOps Toolkit: all tools (Hubs, Power BI, Workbooks, AOE, PowerShell, Open Data), architecture, permissions, deployment steps, and HyperaFinOps migration path

## Existing Documentation

- [Data Dictionary](../finops-powerbi/docs/data-dictionary.md) - Complete data dictionary with all table columns and types (pt-BR)
- [DAX Measures Reference](../finops-powerbi/docs/dax-measures-reference.md) - All DAX measures with formulas (pt-BR)
- [Data Export Setup](../finops-powerbi/scripts/setup-data-exports.md) - EA data export configuration (manual + automated)
- [Refresh Instructions](../finops-powerbi/scripts/refresh-instructions.md) - Monthly refresh workflow and troubleshooting
- [Implementation Plan](../Plans/snug-jingling-moler.md) - Full implementation plan with phases 1-7

## Getting Started

### Power BI Project Setup

**Prerequisites:** Power BI Desktop (March 2023+)

**Open & Configure:**

```bash
# 1. Open project
# Open finops-powerbi/HyperaFinOps.pbip in Power BI Desktop

# 2. Configure data source
# Transform Data > Edit Parameters > Set Parameter_ExportFolder

# 3. Refresh data
# Home > Refresh
```

### Python Scripts Setup

**Prerequisites:** Python 3.10+, Azure CLI

```bash
cd finops-powerbi/scripts
pip install -r requirements.txt
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with Azure credentials

# Export billing data
python export_billing_data.py --period 202602

# Detect anomalies
python detect_anomalies.py --data-folder ./data
```

## For AI-Assisted Development

This documentation was generated specifically to enable AI agents to understand and extend this codebase.

### When Planning New Features:

**Data model changes:**
→ Reference: `data-models.md`, `architecture.md`

**New DAX measures:**
→ Reference: `data-models.md` (schema), existing [DAX Measures Reference](../finops-powerbi/docs/dax-measures-reference.md)

**New report pages:**
→ Reference: `architecture.md` (report pages table), `development-guide.md` (adding pages)

**Python automation:**
→ Reference: `development-guide.md` (Python scripts section), `architecture.md` (automation layer)

**New data sources:**
→ Reference: `architecture.md` (ETL layer), `data-models.md` (schema), [Data Export Setup](../finops-powerbi/scripts/setup-data-exports.md)

**Budget/compliance changes:**
→ Reference: `data-models.md` (Dim_Budget, mandatory tags), `development-guide.md` (updating budgets)

**Spot VM optimization (Page 8):**
→ Reference: `deep-dive-spot-vms.md` (pricing model, eviction types, ARG queries, proposed tables/measures/page)

**Container / AKS cost allocation:**
→ Reference: `container-costs-aks.md` (allocation strategies, labeling, optimization tactics, HyperaFinOps gaps)

**FinOps Framework alignment / capability mapping:**
→ Reference: `finops-2026-framework.md` (capability coverage map, technology categories, tag schema alignment, gap priority table)

**FinOps Hub integration / migration planning:**
→ Reference: `finops-hub-mer.md` (FOCUS datasets, entity relationships, key cost columns, schema versioning)
→ Reference: `finops-toolkit-overview.md` (full tool catalog, architecture, permissions, HyperaFinOps migration path)

---

_Documentation generated by BMAD Method `document-project` workflow_
